creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #8)
May I ask to fix the bug? It was annoying when I started using FreeBSD on desktop in 2017. I no longer use deadbeef, but it would be nice if new users won't be annoyed by this.

I also added USE_XORG, because deadbeef can't build on Wayland-only environments (e.g. no libGL no libx{11,xb}.

Build/runtime tested on FreeBSD 14 sway GTK3 + poudriere.
